aiCommentary: AI was the dominant narrative. Management framed Alphabet's 'full-stack' AI approach — frontier Gemini models, custom TPU silicon, global infrastructure, and distribution — as lighting up every part of the business. Enterprise AI solutions became Cloud's primary growth driver for the first time, with Gemini Enterprise paid monthly active users up 40% QoQ, and Gemini processing >16B tokens/minute via direct API (+60% QoQ). Serving unit costs fell ~78% over 2025 via model/efficiency optimizations, improving AI economics. In Search, AI Overviews and AI Mode drove record query volume and 19% revenue growth, countering the disruption thesis. The raised $180-190B capex guide reflects continued buildout of TPU/GPU compute to meet a >$460B Cloud backlog.
demandCommentary: Demand was described as strong and broad-based across the business. Google Cloud growth accelerated to 63% on enterprise AI infrastructure and solutions demand, with backlog exceeding $460B indicating multi-year committed contracts. Advertising demand held up with Search at all-time-high query volume and YouTube ads growing to $9.88B. External TPU demand was a standout — multi-gigawatt commitments (Anthropic up to ~$40B/5GW; Meta in talks; Blackstone neocloud JV) point to merchant-silicon demand beyond Google's own cloud. Management flagged that supply (compute capacity) remains a gating factor for both external sales and internal model training.

keyQuotes.quote: 2026 is off to a terrific start. Our AI investments and full stack approach are lighting up every part of the business... Search had a strong quarter with AI experiences driving usage, queries at an all time high, and 19% revenue growth.
keyQuotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai, CEO

keyQuotes.quote: Our first-party models, like Gemini, are now processing more than 16 billion tokens per minute via direct API use by customers, up 60% from last quarter.
keyQuotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai, CEO

keyQuotes.quote: Enterprise AI solutions have become the primary growth driver for cloud for the first time in Q1.
keyQuotes.speaker: Sundar Pichai, CEO
